sub_sims.s_expr:
(sub-sim
          (begin
            (define candidates (filter (lambda (r) (> (nth r 1) 10)) my-relationships))
            (define best (if (empty? candidates) my-id (nth (car candidates) 0)))

diary_entries.entry: The resource_strike changed everything. I feel worried about our future here.
Population: 26. New mineral deposits discovered. I spent the year on mediation. Closest to Nova.
The resource_strike changed everything. I feel optimistic about our future here.

meta_awareness: Ares-18 (year 97): 'I wonder if the data sloshing through our colony is someone else's frame output becoming our frame input.'
